description_long: This object is a circular monument featuring a tall, slender central obelisk made of weathered, dark stone or wood, rising from a hexagonal or octagonal paved base. Surrounding the obelisk are multiple upright, white sculpted figures or stelae, each with distinct carved forms and humanoid shapes, arranged in a ring. The base is bordered by a band of earth or grass, giving the installation a grounded, outdoor appearance. The obelisk itself is unadorned, with a rough, natural finish, while the surrounding figures display varying degrees of detail and stylization. The entire ensemble evokes a ceremonial or commemorative site, possibly inspired by ancient or prehistoric monuments. The arrangement and materials suggest a public art installation or a cultural landmark in a park or plaza.
description: A tall, weathered central obelisk stands on a paved base, encircled by white sculpted humanoid figures, forming a ceremonial monument. The installation is bordered by earth or grass, evoking an ancient or commemorative site.
description_view_0: The front view shows the central obelisk with the most detailed faces of the surrounding white sculpted figures visible, highlighting their humanoid forms.
description_view_1: This view reveals the obelisk from a slight angle, with more of the side profiles of the surrounding figures and a clearer view of the base's shape.
description_view_2: The obelisk is seen from the rear, with the backs of the white figures visible and the base's border more prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the obelisk from another side, with several figures partially obscured and the rough texture of the obelisk more apparent.
attribute_ornamentation: The surrounding white figures are ornately carved with humanoid shapes and abstract patterns, each unique in form and detail. The central obelisk itself is unornamented.
attribute_base_design: The base is a flat, hexagonal or octagonal paved platform, bordered by a ring of earth or grass. It is slightly raised and provides a stable foundation for the obelisk and surrounding figures.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is pointed and rough, with no visible decoration or finishing elements.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is encircled by multiple upright, white sculpted figures arranged in a ring, all set on a paved base bordered by earth or grass.
